query:
SELECT 'sites' as table_name, COUNT(*) as count FROM sites
UNION ALL
SELECT 'site_configurations', COUNT(*) FROM site_configurations
UNION ALL
SELECT 'assessments', COUNT(*) FROM assessments
UNION ALL
SELECT 'equipment_detections', COUNT(*) FROM equipment_detections
UNION ALL
SELECT 'custom_analyses', COUNT(*) FROM custom_analyses;
